mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, logistics_status, end_receive_warehouse, sign_date, sign_user, sign_warehouse, ship_date, carried, express_code, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, delflag, remark
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.transfer_info
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.transfer_info (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, logistics_status, end_receive_warehouse, sign_date, sign_user, sign_warehouse, ship_date, carried, express_code, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, delflag, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logisticsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{endReceiveWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{signUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{signWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

id,
invoice_id,
invoice_no,
logistics_status,

mapper.update:
update dbo.transfer_info
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logistics_status = #{record.logisticsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
end_receive_warehouse = #{record.endReceiveWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_date = #{record.signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sign_user = #{record.signUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
sign_warehouse = #{record.signWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.transfer_info set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logistics_status = #{record.logisticsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, end_receive_warehouse = #{record.endReceiveWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_date = #{record.signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sign_user = #{record.signUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, sign_warehouse = #{record.signWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.transfer_info
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logistics_status = #{logisticsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
end_receive_warehouse = #{endReceiveWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_date = #{signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sign_user = #{signUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
sign_warehouse = #{signWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.transfer_info set invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logistics_status = #{logisticsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, end_receive_warehouse = #{endReceiveWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_date = #{signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sign_user = #{signUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, sign_warehouse = #{signWarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
